あぁぁ……旦那様……かっこいい……。<br>今日一日ずっと陰から見守っていますが:
Aaah... darling... so handsome...
I've watched from the shadows all day, still can't stop staring...
整った顔立ちはもちろんのこと、あの気だるげな瞳。<br>とてもリラックスしていて:
It's not just his handsome features, but those languid eyes.
So relaxed, so full of quiet masculine confidence.
なにより、ここぞという時にはキリッと鋭くなるギャップを<br>知っている身として:
And above all, knowing how sharp and focused he becomes
the moment it truly matters — I simply can't help being drawn in...
んはぁ……あのかっこいい瞳で見つめられたい……<br>そう、今のように近くでじっ:
Nnh... I want him to look at me with those cool eyes...
yes, just like this, up close, slowly savoring it... hm?
はわわ！ だ、旦那様！？ いつから私に気づいて！？: Hawawa! D-darling!? Since when were you aware of me!?
